summary: Iteration 51 testing complete - Analytics month labels fix, Quick Links level permissions, mobile responsiveness, and iOS Safari select fix all verified working

minor.issue: Was not including quick_link_permissions in response - FIXED by testing agent

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <tbody>' - React dev tools injection, not a code issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 features fully tested. Analytics charts now show unique month labels in 'Mon YY' format (Nov 25, Dec 25, Jan 26, etc.) with no duplicate 'Jan'. Member Levels editor has 'Permissions (My Account — Quick Links)' section with checkboxes for 4 quick links (Home, KMS, News, Backend). Quick links bar is visible on mobile (no hidden sm:flex). iOS Safari select fix applied with appearance:menulist and opacity:1. Members Manager still has Register column showing created_at dates.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics: PASS - Returns unique month labels in 'Mon YY' format, no duplicate Jan
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/member-levels: PASS - Returns levels with quick_link_permissions array
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/member-levels: PASS - Creates level with quick_link_permissions (fixed by testing agent)
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/members: PASS - Returns members with created_at for Register column

frontend_member_levels.quick_links_permissions_section: PASS - 'Permissions (My Account — Quick Links)' section visible in dialog
frontend_member_levels.quick_link_checkboxes: PASS - 4 checkboxes found (Home, KMS, News, Backend)
frontend_member_levels.level_1_permissions: PASS - Level 1 shows Home and KMS quick link permissions

frontend_myaccount.quick_links_bar_mobile: PASS - Quick links bar VISIBLE on mobile (no hidden sm:flex)
frontend_myaccount.admin_sees_all_links: PASS - Admin (qlPerms=null) sees all 4 quick links

frontend_analytics.unique_month_labels: PASS - Charts show Nov 25, Dec 25, Jan 26, Feb 26, Mar 26, Apr 26 (no duplicates)

frontend_members_manager.register_column: PASS - 'Register' column header found showing created_at dates

ios_safari_fix.select_style: PASS - MembershipEnrollment.js has selectStyle with appearance:menulist and opacity:1
